creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 197633
netbox-2.4.4.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that updates net-mgmt/netbox to 2.4.4 .

Changes by upstream:
- https://github.com/digitalocean/netbox/blob/v2.4.4/CHANGELOG.md

Changes to the port:
- Refined instructions for upgrading
- Removed installation instructions. They are now accessible on the FreeBSD wiki.

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (10.4- and 11.2-RELEASE, 12.0-ALPHA8 i386 + amd64) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK


Note:
Before this update can be committed, the following patches for the dependent ports must be committed first:
- update www/py-django-mptt to 0.9.1 (see also bug #231087)
- update security/py-paramiko to 2.4.1 (see also bug #231090)
- update graphics/py-pillow to 5.2.0 (see also bug #231088)
